welcome.title: Let's bring your business online.
welcome.subtitle: We'll get you taking payments in under 8 minutes. No boilerplate — we'll adapt to what kind of business you run.
assurances: Every field autofills from your industry — override anything
KYC happens in parallel · your dashboard unlocks immediately
Your first test payment runs end-to-end before we activate

header.title: A few questions to tailor everything
header.subtitle: Your answers shape what we recommend — methods, settlement cadence, defaults.

industryPresets.label: SaaS · subscriptions
industryPresets.description: Recurring billing, usage-based plans, global customers.
recommendations: Enable UPI Autopay — Indian SaaS customers convert 3× better with it vs cards
Set dunning on failed subscription charges with a 3-retry window
Offer annual plans with a 2-month discount — LTV jumps 40%

industryPresets.label: E-commerce · physical goods
industryPresets.description: Cart checkout, shipping, returns, COD if you need it.
recommendations: Enable Cart Guard on high-value orders to reduce friendly fraud
Set up refund auto-policies by reason code — common patterns save support time
Brand your checkout — conversion lifts ~8% over generic

industryPresets.label: Food · restaurants, delivery
industryPresets.description: Fast checkout, small tickets, high volume, tip splits.
recommendations: T+0 settlement is important — most restaurant operators live on daily cash flow
Enable tips as a separate settlement account for clean staff payout
UPI + Wallets cover 90% of food orders — can defer card setup

industryPresets.label: Creator · services, courses
industryPresets.description: Per-session bookings, courses, subscriptions, small-batch selling.
recommendations: Payment links are your best friend — no site needed to start
Enable subscriptions for cohort-based courses or monthly memberships
Your public Payze page (payze.app/@you) works as a landing page

industryPresets.label: Education · classes, coaching
industryPresets.description: Course fees, installments, certifications, parent-facing receipts.
recommendations: Installment plans via UPI Autopay help parents with cash flow
Receipt templates can be customized for course + student name
Set up auto-refunds with 7-day window for course-withdrawal cases

industryPresets.label: Professional services
industryPresets.description: Consulting, agencies, retainers, custom invoicing with GST.
recommendations: Invoice-first workflow — ditch payment links for your use case
Configure GSTR-1 exports right away · saves 3 hours every month
Retainers work well as mandate-backed recurring — lower failures than manual invoicing

industryPresets.label: Marketplace · platform
industryPresets.description: Multiple sellers, split payouts, take rates, seller KYC.
recommendations: Scale plan is required for programmatic seller payouts
Each seller needs their own KYC — we handle sub-merchant onboarding
Split settlement rules can be configured per-transaction or per-seller

industryPresets.label: Something else
industryPresets.description: Not in this list? No problem — start blank and configure manually.
recommendations: We'll default to a balanced configuration
You can customize anything from the dashboard later
Reach out to support@payze.app if you want setup help

webhookEvents.description: Fires when any payment is captured.
Fires on declines and blocks — you see the reason code.
Fires when fallback routing saves a payment.
Fires when funds land in your bank account.
Fires when a customer opens a chargeback.
Fires on every recurring charge · noisy if enabled.

activation.celebrationSubtitle: First test payment landed in 2.3 seconds. Your workspace is ready.
